name: Cafe Venus
description:
Cafe Venus

A giantess themed maid cafe. All maids are double their original height, each dawning their own persona to entice customers to their table. Come in and choose a table. Let them serve you.

4/25 Edit: Added a Table 7.

Updated 9/5 - Added Narrative Drivers for each girl

  • Picture from Marushamo's "All the girls in the store are big and yandere"
